name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please pro...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please pro...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?

If you need me to:
Copy text from a file
Format or transform text in a specific way
Extract information from a message
Or something else

Please share the details, and I'll assist you right away!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?
If you need me to:
Copy text from a file
Format or transform text in a specific way
Extract information from a message
Or something else
Please share the details, and I'll assist you right away!"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you'd like me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text you want me to work with?
  + 
    If you need me to:
    Copy text from a file
    Format or transform text in a specific way
    Extract information from a message
    Or something else
  + 
    Please share the details, and I'll assist you right away!
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
